completed_tasks.name: Insert new token contract <style> with recipe comment + :root defaults
Rewrite inline Tailwind config to consume :root tokens (17 colors + 3 fonts)
Move inline Tailwind config AFTER CDN script (Pitfall 2b — surfaced in V-4)

decisions.decision: Final <head> ordering: FOUC -> token <style> -> CDN -> inline config -> fonts -> component <style>
decisions.rationale: Two simultaneous constraints — token <style> precedes CDN for cascade timing (Pitfall 2), CDN precedes inline config because inline 'tailwind.config = {...}' requires window.tailwind global created by CDN's IIFE (Pitfall 2b — NEW, surfaced in V-4)

decisions.decision: Slate utility name preserved in markup (~80 usages); CSS-var slug is semantic-neutral '--neutral-*-rgb'
decisions.rationale: D-07 — no markup edits in Phase 1; slate->neutral mapping lives only in Tailwind config

decisions.decision: Zero override blocks in Phase 1 — :root IS the Overdrive default
decisions.rationale: D-02 + D-15 — cascade fallback policy means unknown ?client= slugs silently fall through to :root

next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 2 to gather context for Phase 2 (Overdrive Default Theme Migration). Phase 2 retires dark hero, swaps Fraunces -> Space Grotesk as --font-display, and migrates Category B/C/D hex literals (catalog in 01-01-SUMMARY.md § 'Hand-off to Phase 2', with post-Phase-1 line numbers).

blocking_constraints_for_phase_2.name: empirical-probes-on-head-element-ordering
blocking_constraints_for_phase_2.description: RESEARCH §5 prescribed FOUC -> inline config -> token <style> -> CDN based on an unverified claim ('CDN is defer-equivalent — reads window.tailwind.config when it executes, which is after the inline config script has set it'). The claim was structurally checked via grep ordering assertions and plan-checker, but never browser-verified. It shipped to PLAN.md, executor implemented it faithfully, and V-4 caught the runtime ReferenceError after 3 commits had landed. Cost: 1 extra fix commit + 1 docs-correction commit.
blocking_constraints_for_phase_2.structural_mitigation: Before any Phase 2 <head> reordering or addition of a script tag that mutates or depends on globals (e.g., a setup script that touches window.* or a CDN-style runtime), browser-verify the post-edit file via 'python3 -m http.server' + DevTools console — zero JS errors AND visible identity matches baseline — BEFORE the plan locks. Grep ordering assertions are necessary but NOT sufficient for runtime-behavior claims. This applies particularly to any phase that touches the inline 'tailwind.config = {...}' block or the CDN script position.

advisory_constraints.name: claude-code-worktree-spawn-base-quirk
advisory_constraints.description: Claude Code's Agent(isolation='worktree') spawned the Phase 1 executor's worktree off main (04a9b0f) rather than off the orchestrator's HEAD (rebrand-theming @ e3a92fd). The executor self-corrected via 'git reset --hard rebrand-theming' before any commits — safe because the worktree branch had zero unique commits to lose. If a future executor commits BEFORE doing the base-check, the harness can lose work.
advisory_constraints.guidance: Phase 2 executor agents should assert the worktree's expected base in their FIRST action (before any commits) and HALT if drift is detected. The gsd-executor agent prompt template already includes this check; trust it. If drift is detected at the wrong time (post-commit), do NOT self-recover — surface to the user for manual reconciliation.

advisory_constraints.name: summary-line-numbers-shifted-by-+78
advisory_constraints.description: Phase 1 inserted ~78 lines into <head> (new FOUC + token <style>), shifting all line numbers below by +78. The Category B/C/D hex catalogs in 01-01-SUMMARY.md were re-verified post-Phase-1 for the listed entries, but Phase 2's discuss/plan should re-grep at start in case any drift remains.
advisory_constraints.guidance: At Phase 2 discuss/plan kickoff, re-run the Category-B/C/D greps from 01-RESEARCH.md §11 to capture current line numbers — do NOT trust the line numbers in 01-RESEARCH.md or 01-PATTERNS.md verbatim (they reflect main-branch state pre-Phase-1).

context_notes: Phase 1 shipped with one V-4-caught runtime bug (inline-config-before-CDN, fixed in 00a6b21). The bug originated in RESEARCH §5, was never empirically probed before locking the plan, and survived plan-checker iteration 2. Documented as Pitfall 2b in 01-RESEARCH.md + correction in 01-PATTERNS.md (commit a9e5b35). Lesson captured in ~/.claude/lessons.md. Branch pushed to origin/rebrand-theming; working tree clean except for pre-existing .planning/COACH-STATE.md untracked file.
